title: Pride Minecraft Logo
description: Replaces the Minecraft Logo with pride flags
body:
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ekBJBgsJ/images/b2c1e6b7d08f63087903101f99fa2a2c3521897b.png)

A simple Pack that replaces the Minecraft main menu Logo with pride flags!

## 🏳️‍🌈 Flags In Order

Pride Flag, Lesbian Flag, MLM (Men loving Men) Flag, Pansexual Flag, Bisexual Flag, Asexual Flag, Transgender Flag, nonbinary Flag, Aromantic Flag
